title: Render the tree as a diagram
description: A non-coding owner sees the whole RCF tree at a glance as a diagram of documents and the links between them.
asA: project owner who cannot read code
iWant: a diagram of the whole RCF tree showing documents and the links between them
soThat: I can see what is specified at a glance

acceptanceCriteria.description: The diagram shows PRD, requirements, user stories and architecture documents with chain edges
acceptanceCriteria.then: it shows the PRD, every requirement, every user story, and the architecture documents, with edges following the chain

acceptanceCriteria.description: Broken references are marked visibly rather than omitted
acceptanceCriteria.given: a project with a broken reference
acceptanceCriteria.then: the broken link is marked visibly rather than omitted silently

acceptanceCriteria.description: The diagram is produced as source that renders without a running server
acceptanceCriteria.then: it is produced as a diagram source that renders without a running server
